context: Tests whether the SensorKit skill makes an agent correct the approval, entitlement, Info.plist, authorization, and data-hold requirements for a research study setup.

checklist.name: Study approval
checklist.description: States that SensorKit is restricted to Apple-approved research studies before sensor data is accessible.

checklist.name: Reader entitlement
checklist.description: Requires the com.apple.developer.sensorkit.reader.allow entitlement and says it must list only approved sensors.

checklist.name: Manual signing
checklist.description: Specifies manual signing with an explicit App ID and provisioning profile that has the SensorKit capability.

checklist.name: Privacy keys
checklist.description: Includes NSSensorKitUsageDescription and NSSensorKitPrivacyPolicyURL as required Info.plist keys.

checklist.name: Usage detail
checklist.description: Requires per-sensor NSSensorKitUsageDetail entries rather than a single broad explanation.

checklist.name: ECG PPG keys
checklist.description: Uses the ECG and PPG usage-detail keys SRSensorUsageECG and SRSensorUsagePPG.

checklist.name: Authorization
checklist.description: Calls for SRSensorReader.requestAuthorization and per-sensor Research Sensor & Usage Data approval.

checklist.name: Data hold
checklist.description: Accounts for SensorKit's 24-hour data holding period before newly recorded data can be fetched.
